part_is: 6xHis (hexahistidine) polyhistidine affinity tag — a canonical 6-aa IMAC purification tag (HHHHHH).

part_is: 6xHis (hexahistidine) polyhistidine affinity tag — a canonical 6-aa IMAC purification tag (HHHHHH).

part_is: 6xHis (hexahistidine) polyhistidine affinity tag — a canonical 6-aa IMAC purification tag (HHHHHH).

part_is: Natural 29 bp Tn10 PtetA promoter: a sigma-70 -35/-10 promoter whose spacer holds the central 17 bp of the tetO1 operator, making transcription TetR/anhydrotetracycline-controllable.
claim_label: TetR repression at the tetO1 operator is relieved by tetracycline / anhydrotetracycline (aTc).

asserted_source.quote: Bound by TetR; binding is relieved by tetracycline/anhydrotetracycline.
